inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating cash flow $19.03B less capital spending $1.21B, divided by 1,773M weighted average diluted shares (10-K filed 2026-02-20)
inputs.normalization_note: Owner cash uses cash from operations minus capital spending; excludes large other non-operating income ($5.8B FY2025) and intangible impairment charges in GAAP net income

bear.notes: Biosimilar erosion spreads beyond Humira; litigation reserves rise; debt refinancing at higher rates

base.notes: Skyrizi +50% and Rinvoq +39% FY2025 offset Humira -49%; Q1 2026 revenue +12.4% YoY

bull.notes: Immunology leadership sustains high-teens growth; neuroscience and oncology stabilize; leverage falls

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Stockholders equity $3.27B vs $134B assets; Allergan intangible amortization depresses GAAP book — economic value in product cash flows, not balance-sheet floor (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Operating pharma; pipeline valued through R&D spend, not hidden acreage

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Operating income $15.1B FY2025; all therapeutic areas revenue-positive (10-K product table)

option_scan.question: Backlog / R&D pipeline not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Late-stage immunology and oncology readouts (Skyrizi CD induction, Rinvoq vitiligo/AA) — upside in bull only; not in Lawrence base FCF₀

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Imbruvica/Venclexta J&J and Genentech collaborations; profit share in segment revenue, not separate NAV (10-Q Note 5)

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Humira antitrust and product-liability reserves; non-cash litigation adjustments in OCF reconciliation (10-K cash flow statement)

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Skyrizi and Rinvoq growth already in reported revenue and OCF; Humira decline explicit in filings

growth_explanation.years_1_5: Skyrizi and Rinvoq immunology growth (+50% / +39% FY2025) replaces Humira erosion (-49%); Q1 2026 consolidated revenue +12.4% YoY.
growth_explanation.years_6_7: Step-down as immunology base enlarges and biosimilar pressure spreads; neuroscience and aesthetics provide mix support.
growth_explanation.source: 10-K FY2025 product revenue table and Q1 2026 10-Q MD&A

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
